name: Tuna Noodle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a 12-inch skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
3. Cook onions and bell pepper until tender.
4. Add soup, cheddar cheese, yogurt, crushed red pepper, black pepper, macaroni shells, and tuna. Stir until combined.
5. Pour the entire mixture into a 2-1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. In a separate bowl, combine bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese.
7. Sprinkle the crumb mixture on top of the vegetable mixture.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
